accommodations.text: Read test directions and math word problems aloud on request.
accommodations.source_quote: read test directions and math word problems aloud

accommodations.text: State task expectations explicitly and in writing.
accommodations.source_quote: state task expectations explicitly and in writing

accommodations.text: Pair new vocabulary with visuals and definitions.
accommodations.source_quote: pair new vocabulary with visuals and definitions

accommodations.text: Administer assessments in a small-group, reduced-distraction setting.
Allow text-to-speech for grade-level reading passages.
Provide a checklist to break long assignments into steps.
accommodations.source_quote: checklist to break long assignments into steps

accommodations.text: Provide 25% extended time on timed assessments.
Provide captions or a transcript for all audio and video media.
accommodations.source_quote: captions or a transcript for all audio and video media

accommodations.text: Use the personal FM/DM listening system in every class.
accommodations.source_quote: personal FM/DM listening system in every class

goals.text: Jamal will organize a multi-paragraph response using an outline in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Organizes a response without an outline in 2 of 5 samples.
goals.source_quote: organize a multi-paragraph response using an outline

goals.text: Priya will follow two-step spoken directions in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Follows two-step directions in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: follow two-step spoken directions in 4 of 5 opportunities

goals.text: Jamal will answer inferential questions about a text with 80% accuracy.
goals.source_quote: answer inferential questions about a text with 80% accuracy
